title: Normalise local batch model import markers
description: Imported WhisperKit batch models can keep legacy Hugging Face alias IDs/markers, making the UI show a model as ready while the exact resolved WhisperKit model path has not actually been prepared. This can leave Local Batch stuck loading, even though Local Streaming works through the separate sherpa path.
acceptance_criteria: Local Batch imported argmaxinc/whisperkit-coreml aliases are normalised to exact model IDs; stale alias markers do not make batch models appear ready; selected stored local batch IDs are normalised on startup; streaming sources remain separate.
close_reason: Local Batch imported WhisperKit aliases now normalise to exact resolved model IDs and stored selections, preventing stale alias install markers from showing unprepared batch models as ready while keeping streaming sources separate.

title: Apply user prompt to local post-processing context
description: Local post-processing appears not to observe the user-defined prompt/system instruction. Reported reproduction: a prompt expected output with a full stop after each word, but local post-processing did not follow that pattern. Verify whether postProcessingSystemPrompt is injected into the local model context/system prompt and fix the local pipeline so downloaded/local LLM post-processing honours the user prompt. Evidence screenshots: /Users/cm/Desktop/Screenshot 2026-05-14 at 14.04.00.png and /Users/cm/Desktop/Screenshot 2026-05-14 at 14.04.25.png
acceptance_criteria: Local post-processing sends the configured user prompt/system instruction to the local model; a prompt requiring full stops after each word is reflected in the output; UI/model history still show friendly local model names; add regression coverage or a documented manual verification path.
close_reason: Downloaded local post-processing now sends an explicit local system contract and marks user cleanup instructions as authoritative, including formatting-only prompts.

title: Suppress placeholder post-transcription output for empty recordings
description: When a recording contains no speech/no transcript, post-transcription currently outputs the placeholder sentence 'This is a raw transcript.' instead of leaving the result empty. Investigate the empty transcript path and prompt/context handling so no-speech recordings persist/insert an empty transcript rather than generated boilerplate.
acceptance_criteria: Empty or no-speech recordings produce an empty post-processed output; the literal placeholder 'This is a raw transcript.' is not shown or inserted; add regression coverage around empty transcript post-processing if practical.
close_reason: Empty, whitespace-only, and blank-audio-marker transcripts now short-circuit post-processing and return an empty processed output without calling local or remote models.

title: Fix stale Hugging Face local install markers
description: Migrated Hugging Face WhisperKit aliases must use the resolved exact model folder in their model ID/install marker so old imported models are not shown as ready before the real model is downloaded and loaded.
close_reason: Resolved imports now use exact WhisperKit model IDs/install markers so stale markers no longer make models look prepared.

title: Fix Hugging Face local model imports
description: Imported Hugging Face WhisperKit models should show a real model size, resolve ambiguous argmaxinc/whisperkit-coreml aliases to exact model folders, and avoid making first transcription look stuck by preparing the model during install/selection.
close_reason: Resolved Hugging Face WhisperKit aliases to exact sized variants, prepared models during install/selection, and clarified local transcription HUD copy.

title: Wire sherpa-onnx local streaming runtime
description: Replace the current Local Streaming placeholder with a working sherpa-onnx runtime integration on Apple Silicon. Add runtime install/health checks, model download/prepare, live audio chunk streaming, partial/final transcript handling, and clear failure states while keeping all transcription local.
acceptance_criteria: Local Streaming can install or locate sherpa-onnx, download/prepare a selected Zipformer model, stream microphone audio locally with partial and final transcript events, and surface actionable errors when the runtime is unavailable.
close_reason: Implemented sherpa-onnx local streaming runtime, model download, live controller, and UI wiring.

title: Clarify Local Batch and Local Streaming settings
description: Split Local Batch and Local Streaming language and import surfaces so streaming model sources are tracked separately from WhisperKit batch downloads, while making clear both modes remain local-only.
close_reason: Separated Local Batch and Local Streaming settings, added local-only streaming source tracking, and clarified streaming runtime/download status.

title: Add local streaming architecture
description: Add a dedicated local streaming transcription path under Local Models, avoiding accidental fallback to Apple Speech or cloud live providers.
close_reason: Added explicit local streaming sub-mode, offline-only guard, and prerelease unavailable state.

title: Split local and remote transcription settings
description: Separate transcription settings into local and remote surfaces, with local offline and local streaming as distinct sub-modes.
close_reason: Implemented local/remote settings split with Local Offline and Local Streaming sub-modes.

title: Hide local blank audio marker
description: Filter WhisperKit [BLANK_AUDIO] markers from local transcription results before text insertion or history.
close_reason: Filtered WhisperKit [BLANK_AUDIO] marker from local transcript text

title: Assess local live transcription support
description: Check whether WhisperKit-backed local models can support live streaming transcription in the prerelease and wire it when safe; otherwise make offline-only capability explicit.
close_reason: Confirmed WhisperKit local models are offline batch in this prerelease and guarded local live fallback

title: Add Hugging Face local model import
description: Allow users to discover compatible Hugging Face local transcription models via filtered search and import/install a model so it becomes ready to select in Local Model mode.
close_reason: Added Hugging Face filtered browse/import/install flow for WhisperKit local models

title: Show selected transcription settings only
description: Update macOS transcription settings so mode-specific sections only appear for the currently selected transcription mode.
close_reason: Mode-specific transcription settings now only show for the selected transcription type

title: Upgrade local models prerelease UX
description: Make downloaded local models easier and more instructive to select, download, install, and run in the macOS prerelease app.
close_reason: Upgraded local model settings flow with quick-start guidance, selected model status, and clearer download/use actions

title: Build downloaded local models prerelease
description: Implement a prerelease branch for downloadable local transcription models as a distinct provider family from Apple Speech, keeping the work separate from main until ready.
close_reason: Implemented prerelease local model support, build/test verified

title: Update Renovate packages and live streaming website copy
description: Apply any available package update from Renovate PRs, then update the landing page to emphasise supported live streaming transcription models.
close_reason: Updated dependency pins from recent dependency PRs and refreshed the landing page around live streaming transcription models.

title: Move Beads integration to Copilot CLI
description: Move Beads automatic context priming out of Claude-specific configuration and into the repo-local GitHub Copilot CLI hook location.
close_reason: Moved Beads context priming to GitHub Copilot CLI hook configuration.

title: Add local model post-processing
description: Add an optional local-model post-processing path so downloaded local models can clean up or rewrite transcripts without sending text to cloud LLM providers. Keep this after the local model import/streaming prerelease work.
close_reason: Added local offline post-processing and improved Local Streaming candidate selection UX
